name: ITT INC.
business: ITT Inc. is a diversified manufacturer of highly engineered critical components and customized technology solutions for the transportation, industrial and energy markets. Its product and service offerings are organized into three segments: Motion Technologies (MT), Industrial Process (IP), and Connect & Control Technologies (CCT). The company manufactures key components that are integral to the operation of systems and manufacturing processes in the markets it serves.

exposures.sentence: organic revenue increased $51.5, or 6.2%, reflecting growth in connectors of 5% and components of 7%, primarily within the aerospace and defense markets.
